Redis SetGetMany pipeline lane for hot multi-key cache paths
Redis Streams XAddMany lane for durable projector/event relay append pressure

Hermes trusted rebuild from live Postgres snapshot; control-plane repair/warmup lane
Hermes tailer applies committed projection envelopes from live Redis Streams before ack
Hermes indexed hot count after live Postgres rebuild; TotalUnits may be capped by SERVICE_BACKED_LOAD_RESEARCH_HERMES_READ_OPS
Mixed workflow: Postgres SendBatch + Redis SetGetMany + Hermes ApplyRecords in one bounded batch lane
